title: Review: wallet/src/*.rs security/correctness round 13
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — sessions_to_watch SQL filter is non-exhaustive over PaymentState variants; balance() counts undecrypted stubs and witness-free notes (tracked separately). New findings: 1 task-level risk filed.
Confidence: 85% chance of no missed bugs in the code reviewed. Uncertainty driven by: (1) could not run the test suite to verify all tests pass, (2) the db.rs migration correctness depends on SQLite's transactional DDL behavior which I verified by reading the migration code but not by running it against a real DB with version < N, (3) the select_with_fee convergence proof relies on zip317_fee being monotone-non-decreasing which holds for the current formula but was verified analytically not empirically. Would raise confidence if: (a) ran cargo test --package nie-wallet to confirm all tests pass, (b) inspected what happens at the sqlx transaction DEFERRED→IMMEDIATE boundary with WAL mode.
